'''Vhell Kursoc''' was a member of the [[Blood Raptors]] gang on [[Genarius]]. He was ready to take [[Scar Blenner]]'s place if Scar ever screwed up.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Vhell Kursoc was simply a rename of Scar Blenner for a later encounter of ''[[The Price of Business]]'', in case the players had killed Scar in the first encounter.

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|The Price of Business}} {{1st}}
